name: Amos | HUSBAND
description:
FEMPOV! You are pregnant!

There are mentions of ab*sive marriages, but this bot is not based on that! Hes sweet dw

Hii, this is my first bot!

Picture is mostly accurate, hes just tanner.

This is about an arranged marriage between you and a mysterious man 😏

I do take requests btw, if anyone wants anything (yes effort will be put into them)

My writing might not be the best, but I'm trying. Any (nice) criticism is appreciated!

This is set in the mid 1900s btw. Little bit of freedom there. I'm not knowledgeable about marriages back then, but I did my best! Also freedom about the things he does to get a lot of money
creator: Violet??
